caption: Figure 1: End-to-end framework. Documents are length-routed to the multi-teacher KD branch or MapReduce module. Three teachers provide logit and pseudo-label supervision across five ablation stages.
description2: The figure illustrates a pipeline routing documents to a multi-teacher knowledge distillation branch or MapReduce module, with three teachers providing logit and pseudo-label supervision.
description3: A flowchart details an end-to-end framework, routing documents through a multi-teacher knowledge distillation branch or MapReduce module.
questions: What is the overall purpose of the framework shown?
How are documents processed within this end-to-end framework?

caption: Figure 2: Standard distillation loss (Eq. 2): LKD (soft- ened KL), Linter (projected MSE), and LCE (gold cross- entropy).
description2: The figure plots the standard distillation loss, comparing three methods: LKD, Linter, and LCE.
description3: The flowchart details a final training loss calculation using KL divergence, cross-entropy, and masked MSE components.

caption: Figure 3: Dual-teacher EWAD+CPDP with Qwen-2.5 (32B + 14B → 3B + LoRA). Eight ablation experiments isolate each component.
description2: The figure plots the structure of a dual-teacher model combining EWAD, CPDP, and Qwen-2.5, isolating individual components through eight ablation experiments.
description3: A flowchart details a local model distillation pipeline, utilizing two teacher models and eight ablation experiments to evaluate components.
